name: Victory Day
traditions: Military parade on Red Square; Immortal Regiment march carrying portraits of WWII veterans; laying wreaths; concerts; fireworks.
historicalBackground: Victory Day celebrates the Soviet Union's defeat of Nazi Germany on May 9, 1945. It is one of Russia's most important holidays.
description: Russia's solemn and triumphant commemoration of victory in WWII, centered on the grand military parade through Red Square.
